extracted_json.summary_topic_line: Course operation and syllabus: lecture-to-assessment flow and the weekly homework cycle.
extracted_json.summary_gist: Notes outlining how the course operates. Lectures (SD) cover building blocks (BBs) — methods, tools, and a framework — which feed into student deliverables: weekly homework, case studies, midterm, and final (take-home exams). A timeline shows the homework cycle across two sprints: assignment given Thursday, HW discussed in class Tuesday, and a perfect HW solution due the following Thursday.

transcription:
